title: REST API Contract Template
content: REST API contract fields: Endpoint (URL path); HTTP Method (GET/POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE); Request Headers (Content-Type/Authorization); Request Body (JSON schema); Response Body (JSON schema); HTTP Status Codes; Error Response format; Authentication method; Rate limits.

title: REST API Endpoint Naming Convention
content: REST naming rules: use nouns not verbs (/orders not /getOrders); plural for collections (/users); hierarchical for sub-resources (/users/{id}/orders); lowercase with hyphens; version in path or header (/v1/users); avoid deep nesting beyond 3 levels.
tags: rest api naming convention endpoint design

title: API Error Response Standard
content: Standard error response: status (HTTP code); code (machine-readable string e.g. RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND); message (human-readable description); details (array of field-level errors); requestId (for tracing); timestamp. Consistent across all endpoints.

title: HTTP Status Code Standards for APIs
content: 4xx client errors: 400 Bad Request (validation failed); 401 Unauthorized (not authenticated); 403 Forbidden (not authorized); 404 Not Found; 409 Conflict; 422 Unprocessable Entity (business rule violation); 429 Too Many Requests. 5xx: 500 Internal Server Error; 503 Service Unavailable.

title: GraphQL Schema Requirements Template
content: GraphQL requirements: Query definitions (read operations); Mutation definitions (write operations); Subscription definitions (real-time); Type definitions with field types and nullability; Input types for mutations; Error handling via union types; Pagination (first/after cursor-based).

title: API Versioning Strategies
content: Three strategies: URL versioning (/v1/users — simple/cacheable); Header versioning (Accept: application/vnd.api+json;version=1 — clean URLs); Query parameter (/users?version=1 — easy testing). URL versioning recommended for public APIs. Define deprecation policy (min 6 months notice).
tags: api versioning strategy url header backward-compatibility

title: API Backward Compatibility Rules
content: Backward compatible changes: adding optional fields; adding new endpoints; adding new enum values. Breaking changes: removing fields; changing field types; changing endpoint URLs; removing enum values. Breaking changes require major version bump and migration guide.

title: Webhook Design Pattern Requirements
content: Webhook requirements: HTTPS endpoint only; payload signature verification (HMAC-SHA256 header); retry logic (exponential backoff — 3 attempts over 24h); event type field in payload; unique event ID for deduplication; delivery order not guaranteed; idempotent handlers required.
tags: webhook design pattern retry idempotent signature

title: Idempotency Requirements for APIs
content: Idempotency key: client sends unique Idempotency-Key header; server stores result for 24h; repeated requests with same key return cached result without re-processing. Required for: POST payment; POST order; any state-changing operation. Prevents duplicate transactions.

title: Microservice Synchronous Communication
content: Synchronous patterns: REST over HTTP/HTTPS for request-response; gRPC for high-performance internal services; GraphQL for flexible client queries. Requirements: timeout configuration (p99 latency SLA); circuit breaker pattern; retry with backoff; service discovery integration.
tags: microservice sync rest grpc communication pattern

title: Microservice Asynchronous Communication
content: Async patterns: message queues (point-to-point — one consumer); pub/sub topics (one-to-many broadcast); event streaming (Kafka — ordered/replayable). Use async when: operation takes > 2 seconds; fire-and-forget acceptable; temporal decoupling needed.

title: Event-Driven Architecture Requirements
content: EDA requirements: event schema with eventId/eventType/timestamp/source/version/payload; event store for replay capability; at-least-once delivery guarantee; consumer idempotency; dead letter queue for failed events; event versioning strategy; schema registry for compatibility.

title: Message Queue Requirements Template
content: MQ requirements: broker technology (Kafka/RabbitMQ/SQS); queue/topic name convention; message retention period; consumer group configuration; message ordering guarantee (FIFO vs partition-level); max message size; DLQ configuration; monitoring (lag/throughput/error rate).

title: API Rate Limiting Requirements
content: Rate limiting specification: limit (requests per window); window (second/minute/hour/day); scope (per user/per IP/per API key/global); response headers (X-RateLimit-Limit/Remaining/Reset); HTTP 429 on exceed; retry-after header; burst allowance; rate limit tiers by plan.

title: OAuth2/OIDC Integration Requirements
content: OAuth2/OIDC requirements: supported flows (Authorization Code with PKCE for SPA/mobile; Client Credentials for service-to-service); token format (JWT); access token lifetime (15min); refresh token lifetime (30 days); scopes definition; JWKS endpoint for key rotation; token revocation endpoint.
tags: oauth2 oidc jwt authentication integration requirements

title: CORS Policy Requirements
content: CORS requirements: allowed origins (explicit list — no wildcard in production); allowed methods (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE/OPTIONS); allowed headers (Content-Type/Authorization/X-Request-ID); expose headers (X-Total-Count); max age for preflight cache (86400s); credentials allowed (true/false).
tags: cors policy requirements security api browser

title: API SLA Requirements Template
content: API SLA fields: Availability target (99.9%/99.95%/99.99%); p50/p95/p99 latency targets (ms); throughput (requests per second); error rate threshold (<0.1%); measurement window (rolling 30 days); exclusions (planned maintenance); penalty clause; SLA reporting frequency.
tags: api sla availability latency throughput requirements

title: Integration Testing Requirements
content: Integration test requirements: test environment parity with production configuration; API contract tests (consumer-driven — Pact); end-to-end flow tests; error scenario coverage (timeout/network failure/invalid auth); test data isolation; stub/mock for third-party APIs; test result reporting.

title: Circuit Breaker Pattern Requirements
content: Circuit breaker states: Closed (normal — requests pass through); Open (failure threshold exceeded — fast fail for N seconds); Half-Open (probe request — if success return to Closed). Requirements: failure threshold (e.g. 5 failures in 30s); timeout duration; fallback response; monitoring/alerting.

title: Third-Party API Integration Checklist
content: Checklist: API documentation reviewed; authentication method documented; rate limits identified and handled; SLA reviewed against system requirements; sandbox environment available; error response format documented; webhook support (if needed); data format compatibility; GDPR data transfer compliance; fallback strategy defined.

title: OpenAPI/Swagger Specification Requirements
content: OpenAPI requirements: version (3.0+); all endpoints documented; request/response schemas with examples; authentication schemes defined; error responses documented; deprecation marked with sunset date; servers block with environments (dev/staging/prod); tags for grouping; description field mandatory for all operations.

title: JSON Schema Validation Requirements
content: JSON Schema requirements: schema version (draft-07 or 2020-12); required fields explicitly listed; field types specified; string format validation (email/uri/date-time/uuid); number min/max/multipleOf constraints; array minItems/maxItems; additionalProperties: false for strict validation; $ref for reusable types.

title: File Transfer/SFTP Integration Requirements
content: SFTP integration requirements: server hostname/port/credentials management (secrets vault); file naming convention with timestamp; transfer direction (push/pull/both); schedule (cron expression); file format (CSV/JSON/XML); encoding (UTF-8); compression (gzip); PGP encryption requirement; retry on failure; file acknowledgment mechanism; archive policy.

title: Data Format Standards Requirements
content: Data format requirements: date-time in ISO 8601 (2024-01-15T10:30:00Z); currency amounts as integer cents (avoid float); phone numbers in E.164 format (+1234567890); country codes ISO 3166-1 alpha-2; language codes BCP 47; UUIDs for identifiers (v4); null vs absent field distinction documented.
tags: data-format standards iso8601 json api requirements

title: API Authentication Requirements Pattern
content: Authentication requirements: API Key (header X-API-Key — for server-to-server); Bearer Token JWT (Authorization header — for user context); Basic Auth (HTTPS only — legacy); mTLS (for high-security service mesh). Document: token acquisition flow; expiry handling; key rotation procedure.

title: API Documentation Requirements
content: API docs requirements: hosted and versioned (not PDF); interactive (Swagger UI/Redoc); code examples in 3+ languages; authentication guide; error code reference; changelog; rate limit documentation; sandbox with real responses; contact/support information; SDK availability.

title: Async Message Schema Standard
content: Message schema fields: messageId (UUID); eventType (domain.entity.action format e.g. order.payment.completed); version (semantic); timestamp (ISO8601); source (service name); correlationId (trace linking); payload (event-specific data); metadata (optional routing hints). Must be backward compatible.

title: Integration Requirements Review Checklist
content: Review checklist: all external systems identified; data flow diagrams created; API contracts agreed with provider; error scenarios documented; retry and timeout values specified; security requirements (auth/encryption/CORS) documented; monitoring and alerting defined; data volume and rate limits estimated.

title: Pagination Requirements for APIs
content: Pagination options: cursor-based (recommended — stable for real-time data); offset/limit (simple — for static data); keyset (performance — for large sorted datasets). Standard response envelope: data (array); total (count); page/pageSize or next cursor; links (self/next/prev HATEOAS).
tags: api pagination cursor offset requirements standards

title: Timeout Configuration Requirements
content: Timeout requirements by operation type: read operations 3-5 seconds; write operations 10-30 seconds; file upload/download 60-300 seconds; async job submission 5 seconds (for ack only). Clients must handle timeout as retriable error with idempotency key. Server must return 504 on gateway timeout.

title: Service Mesh Integration Requirements
content: Service mesh requirements (Istio/Linkerd): mTLS between all services enforced; traffic policies (retry/timeout/circuit breaker) in mesh config not application code; distributed tracing (Jaeger/Zipkin) with trace propagation headers; canary/blue-green traffic splitting; egress control for external calls.
tags: service-mesh istio mtls tracing integration requirements

title: API Monitoring Requirements
content: API monitoring requirements: latency percentiles (p50/p95/p99) per endpoint; error rate by status code; request volume (RPS); availability uptime; dependency health checks; alerting thresholds with PagerDuty integration; SLO burn rate alerts; dashboard in Grafana/Datadog.
tags: api monitoring requirements observability slo alerting

title: Data Transformation Requirements
content: Data transformation requirements: mapping specification (source field → target field); transformation rules (concatenation/split/format conversion/lookup); null/missing field handling; character encoding conversion; timezone normalization to UTC; business logic transformation documented separately from technical mapping.

title: API Security Requirements Pattern
content: API security requirements: all traffic over TLS 1.2+ (TLS 1.3 preferred); input validation on all fields (not just frontend); SQL/command injection prevention; sensitive data not in URL params or logs; request signing for webhook payloads; secrets in vault (not environment variables); regular penetration testing.
tags: api security tls injection requirements secrets

title: Event Sourcing Integration Requirements
content: Event sourcing requirements: immutable event store; events are the source of truth; current state derived by replaying events; snapshot mechanism for performance; event schema versioning with upcasting; temporal queries (state at point in time); audit log by design.
